details.test: Task 1: Select Shopify launch package and add to project brief
Task 2: Choose cheaper Shopify vs WooCommerce redesign plan
Task 3: Configure maintenance retainer with SEO add-on and add to proposal
Task 4: Save three fashion case studies with >=30% uplift and share shortlist
Task 5: Headless commerce article and monthly newsletter subscription
Task 6: Submit Shopify new store quote with appropriate budget range
Task 7: Book two 60-minute CRO strategy sessions next Tuesday afternoon
Task 8: Compare Shopify, Magento, BigCommerce and open lowest-cost platform guide
Task 9: Combined maintenance + marketing monthly plan under $2,000 and request proposal
